name: rule_8a_structural_l
description: Rule 8a structural short-circuit (owner convention 2026-06-19): Column L is a FLAG (Remote/Yes => inherited) and the inheritance SOURCE is named in Column M (Remote Inheritance Instance). Column L=Remote + Column M='Enterprise' fires the structural 8a branch of classify_row, returning Compliant without examining J/K text triggers and without consulting the LLM. Trigger column = 'M'; narrative formatter is _format_8a_structural_narrative which embeds the Column M source in quotes.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization enforces physical access authorizations at organization-defined entry/exit points to the facility where the information system resides.
